summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Phase 3 features: Hero slider revamp, Milton Keynes location highlighting, and redesigned Our Story/Catering/Contact pages. All 25 tests passed. Hero slider has new dark moody images with strong gradient overlay for excellent text readability. Milton Keynes is prominently displayed in notification bar, hero slider, footer, testimonials, Our Story page, Catering page (Functions card), Contact page (labeled as Main Kitchen), and Snacks page delivery banner.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero slider gradient overlay (rgba(45,36,34,0.92) to 0.3) provides excellent text readability against dark moody food images
Milton Keynes consistently highlighted across all key touchpoints: notification bar, hero, footer, testimonials, story, catering, contact, snacks
Contact page correctly labels Milton Keynes as '(Main Kitchen)' with Edinburgh and Glasgow as secondary locations
Our Story page has all 5 sections: The Beginning, Meaning of Name, Two Culinary Worlds, Our Promise, Serving Across the UK
Catering page has Functions & Events card and Corporate Dabba Wala card with comprehensive service lists
Both Catering and Contact forms work correctly with alert() feedback on submission
Mobile responsiveness excellent - hamburger menu works, content stacks properly
Subscription wizard 4-step flow works correctly with validation and confirmation alert
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 features fully tested. Hero slider has new dark moody images with strong gradient for readability. Milton Keynes is highlighted everywhere as main location. Our Story, Catering, Contact pages completely redesigned with premium design language. All forms work with alert() feedback. All 10 routes functional. Mobile responsive.

hero_slider_readability.details: New dark moody food images with strong gradient overlay (rgba(45,36,34,0.92) to 0.3). White text on dark background is clearly readable. Shows 'Now serving Milton Keynes, Edinburgh & Glasgow' in description.

notification_bar_milton_keynes.details: Shows 'Swagatam! Now serving authentic hot meals in Milton Keynes, Edinburgh & Glasgow | Free Delivery over £30'

footer_milton_keynes.details: Footer shows 'Milton Keynes, Edinburgh & Glasgow, UK' in address section

testimonials_milton_keynes.details: One testimonial from 'Rajesh K.' shows 'Milton Keynes' location

our_story_page.details: Premium hero with gradient overlay. 5 sections: The Beginning, Meaning of Name, Two Culinary Worlds, Our Promise, Serving Across the UK. Milton Keynes mentioned in 'Serving Across the UK' section.

catering_page.details: Premium hero. Functions & Events card with 6 event types. Corporate Dabba Wala card with 6 features. Why Choose Us section with 4 benefits. Enquiry form with all 8 fields (name, email, phone, event type, date, guests, food type, message). Submit shows thank you alert.

contact_page.details: Premium hero. Contact info cards: Locations (Milton Keynes labeled as Main Kitchen), Phone (Orders, Catering, WhatsApp), Email (General, Catering), Hours. Contact form with 5 fields. Social links (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter). Submit shows thank you alert.

snacks_page_milton_keynes.details: UK-Wide delivery banner shows 'Now serving Milton Keynes, Edinburgh & Glasgow'

mobile_responsiveness.details: Hamburger menu works on mobile (390x844). Navigation menu opens/closes correctly. Content stacks properly on mobile viewport.

subscription_wizard.details: 4-step flow works: Duration -> Box Type -> Preferences -> Summary. Validation works (cannot proceed without required selections). Confirm button shows thank you alert.

catering_form_submission.details: Form accepts all inputs and shows 'Thank you for your enquiry! We will contact you within 24 hours.' alert on submit

contact_form_submission.details: Form accepts all inputs and shows 'Thank you for reaching out! We will get back to you soon.' alert on submit

pages_tested.notes: Hero slider with new dark images, Milton Keynes in description, testimonials with MK location
Redesigned with 5 sections, Milton Keynes in 'Serving Across the UK'
Redesigned with services cards, form, CTA. Milton Keynes in Functions card
Redesigned with info cards, form, social links. Milton Keynes as Main Kitchen
UK-wide delivery banner mentions Milton Keynes
Pure veg menu page loads correctly
4-step wizard works with validation and confirmation

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED in /app/frontend/src/mockData.js - No backend API calls
